description_long: This is a large, modern residential house surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with palm trees and shrubs. The structure features multiple interconnected volumes with varying roof heights, primarily gable and hip roofs in dark gray. The exterior walls are light-colored, and the house includes several large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. A paved driveway leads to a garage, and there is a visible swimming pool in the backyard. The property is set within a defined lot, with a main entryway accessible via a short set of steps and a walkway.
description: A spacious, modern house with multiple rooflines, large windows, a garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entry, driveway, garage, and lush landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical facade elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, and more private windows and patio area.
description_view_3: Back-left view emphasizing the rear landscaping, pool area, and multiple roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical rows with large panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a short set of steps, covered porch, and double doors, flanked by columns and decorative landscaping.
